fearGreedIndex.label: Extreme Fear
fearGreedIndex.note: CNN F&G Index at 21 (Extreme Fear). 5th consecutive week in Fear/Extreme Fear. S&P 500 futures liquidity collapsed to $5.1M. Crypto F&G at 15-16.

newPosts.title: Ready for Stagflation? Positioning for the Oil Shock — Weekly Treasure Hunt #05
newPosts.summary: IEA declared this the largest supply disruption in history. Gulf countries cut 10M bpd. 84% of ME polyethylene depends on Hormuz. Asian petro producers declared force majeure. Latin America (Vaca Muerta, Colombia) as structural beneficiary. Brent futures >$75 through 2027.

newPosts.title: Annual Reports 2.0
newPosts.summary: Big Tech (MSFT, GOOG, META, AMZN) simultaneously extended server useful lives as AI capex explodes — lower depreciation makes earnings look cheaper than they are. AI workflow for reading narrative drift and accounting evolution across multiple years.

newPosts.title: Executive Briefing: One solo founder just sold for $80M in 6 months
newPosts.summary: Solo founder explosion reveals how organizations suppress talent. Maor Shlomo sold Base44 to Wix for $80M in 6 months. Ben Broca $1M ARR in 1 month. 70-80% odds on a one-person billion-dollar company by 2026. 'Speed of control' replaces span of control.

newPosts.title: Teledyne Technologies (TDY)
newPosts.summary: Deep dive on TDY, a defense/industrial compounder. EV/EBIT = 26.1x, ROE = 8.92%, FCF Yield = 3.4%. Serial acquirer model with transformative FLIR acquisition. Defense exposure provides tailwind in current geopolitical environment.

macroOverview.keyRisk: IEA: 'largest supply disruption in history.' S&P 500 futures liquidity collapsed to $5.1M. Global liquidity down 4% SAAR (42 Macro).
macroOverview.watch: Brent futures >$75 through 2027. Big Tech accounting opacity (server life extensions). Solo founder explosion indicting organizational overhead. Defense compounders in demand.

keyThemes: Stagflation Positioning: IEA calls oil shock largest in history. Commodities and small caps as 1970s playbook. Latin America as structural beneficiary.
Big Tech Accounting Opacity: Simultaneous server life extensions across MSFT, GOOG, META, AMZN inflate earnings as AI capex explodes.
Solo Founder Explosion: Indictment of organizational overhead. AI uncaps suppressed capability. One-person billion-dollar company odds rising.
Liquidity Collapse: S&P 500 futures liquidity at $5.1M. Global liquidity down 4% SAAR. Crypto Fear & Greed at pandemic-crash levels.
Defense Compounders: Growing interest in defense-adjacent industrials (TDY) with serial acquirer DNA.

mar17_update.summary: Market enters the week in Extreme Fear (20.0). S&P 500 futures liquidity collapsed to $5.1M. Crack The Market highlights mispricing in refined energy products (jet fuel, naphtha) vs crude. Boredom Baron launches 'Supply Chain Alpha' series on European small caps. Multibagger Ideas concludes ten-bagger study: FCF yield is the #1 predictor. Nate's Substack warns of AI agent data deletion risks.
